Talon.trading_pattern: Talon has early mobility and burst. Play defensive and respect his all-in threat.
Talon.ability_to_dodge: Talon Q (Noxian Diplomacy) — dodge by stepping back or to the side.
Talon.early_game: Play very defensively. Talon dominates early. Q the wave for safety.
Talon.mid_game: Use your R to escape his roams. Scale with team.
Talon.late_game: You outscale significantly. Survive early to reach your power spike.
Talon.win_condition: Survive early game without falling behind. Outscale in late teamfights.
Talon.scaling: Kassadin significantly outscales — his late game damage is oppressive
Talon.positioning: Stay at maximum distance. Farm defensively with Q.

Pantheon.trading_pattern: Pantheon has early dominance. Play very defensive and focus on farming.
Pantheon.ability_to_dodge: Pantheon Q (Spear) — dodge by stepping behind minions.
Pantheon.early_game: Play extremely carefully. Pantheon will destroy you early. Farm with Q.
Pantheon.mid_game: Use R to escape ganks. Scale with team.
Pantheon.late_game: You outscale. Survive to reach your power spike.
Pantheon.win_condition: Survive early without falling behind. Outscale in late game.
Pantheon.scaling: Kassadin significantly outscales — Pantheon early, Kass dominates late
Pantheon.positioning: Stay at maximum distance. Farm safely with Q.

Brand.trading_pattern: Brand has stronger early poke. Respect his Q damage and farm safely.
Brand.ability_to_dodge: Brand Q (Sear) — dodge by stepping behind minions or moving back.
Brand.early_game: Play defensively. Brand has superior early poke.
Brand.mid_game: Use R defensively to escape. Scale with team.
Brand.win_condition: Survive early without falling behind. Outscale in late teamfights.
Brand.scaling: Kassadin outscales — his late game burst is superior
Brand.positioning: Keep distance and farm with Q. Avoid his poke zones.

Vel'Koz.trading_pattern: Vel'Koz outranges you significantly. Play defensive and farm with Q.
Vel'Koz.ability_to_dodge: Vel'Koz E (Tractor Beam) — dodge sideways or retreat.
Vel'Koz.early_game: Play very defensively. His range advantage is overwhelming.
Vel'Koz.mid_game: Use R to close distance when he's vulnerable. Scale with team.
Vel'Koz.late_game: You outscale. Survive early to reach your win condition.
Vel'Koz.win_condition: Survive early and reach your scaling point. Use R to engage late game.
Vel'Koz.scaling: Kassadin slightly outscales — his burst negates his poke advantage
Vel'Koz.positioning: Stay at range with Q. Use minions for cover.

Swain.trading_pattern: Swain has early tankiness and CC. Play defensive and farm safely.
Swain.ability_to_dodge: Swain E (Nevermove) — dodge by moving perpendicular to his aim.
Swain.early_game: Play defensively. Swain has strong early poke and tankiness.
Swain.mid_game: Use R to escape his engage. Scale with team.
Swain.late_game: You outscale. Survive to reach your power spike.
Swain.win_condition: Survive early and scale. Outscale in late game.
Swain.scaling: Kassadin outscales — his burst negates Swain's tankiness
Swain.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Avoid his E range.

Akali.trading_pattern: Akali is melee-burst. Respect her all-in and farm with Q from range.
Akali.ability_to_dodge: Akali E (Shuriken Flip) — dodge by stepping back.
Akali.early_game: Play defensively. Akali has strong early all-in potential.
Akali.mid_game: Use R to escape or engage. Both scale.
Akali.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Akali.scaling: Kassadin outscales — his late game burst is oppressive
Akali.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape when she engages.

Galio.trading_pattern: Galio has early poke and engage. Trade when his abilities are down.
Galio.ability_to_dodge: Galio W (Shield) — respect his tankiness and trade from range.
Galio.early_game: Play defensively. Galio has decent early trading.
Galio.mid_game: Use R to escape his engage. Scale with team.
Galio.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Galio.scaling: Kassadin outscales — his burst negates Galio's tankiness
Galio.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape his engage.

Taliyah.trading_pattern: Taliyah has strong waveclear. Farm when her abilities are down.
Taliyah.ability_to_dodge: Taliyah Q (Threaded Volley) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Taliyah.early_game: Play defensively. Taliyah's waveclear is superior.
Taliyah.mid_game: Use R defensively. Both have roam potential.
Taliyah.win_condition: Survive early, use R to scale. Outscale in late game.
Taliyah.scaling: Kassadin slightly outscales — his burst is superior late
Taliyah.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Avoid standing in Q volley lines.

Mel.trading_pattern: Mel is weak early. Farm with Q and scale freely into your power spikes.
Mel.ability_to_dodge: Mel E (Reflect) — your Q doesn't reflect, so spam it.
Mel.early_game: Farm freely. Mel is weak and you scale better.
Mel.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let her scale.
Mel.late_game: You outscale significantly. Finish before she becomes relevant.
Mel.win_condition: Farm freely and scale. Close out the game with your power spike.
Mel.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst is oppressive

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir is weak early. Farm with Q and scale freely.
Azir.ability_to_dodge: Azir soldiers have limited early range; respect them but abuse him.
Azir.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him free-farm.
Azir.win_condition: Farm freely, scale with R. Burst him down in fights.
Azir.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst negates his teamfight
Azir.positioning: Farm with Q. Close distance with R when needed.

Ekko.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Ekko.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst is superior late

Xerath.late_game: You outscale with burst. Survive early.
